propositions: Epic AC10 requires the verdict enum in verify_signature_result.schema.json to include key_not_valid_at_era alongside the original four values (unsigned, foreign_key, certified, mismatch).
The schema description must document the verified/unverified/unsigned display grouping for the verdicts.
The TS3 held-out test test_verify_signature_schema_unchanged must be corrected to assert the enum now includes key_not_valid_at_era rather than the original four.
Schema-derived drift gates (public-types and output-schema coverage) must remain green after the enum change.
The verify-authorship classification logic is out of scope since TS3 already emits the key_not_valid_at_era verdict.
